findings.reason: ac-3/ac-4 regression: install-plugin.mjs no longer writes enabledPlugins['ditto@ditto-local'] (registerPlugin removed), but pluginEnabled() still requires that exact key. plugin_enabled is now structurally always false for new-model users, so 'ditto doctor distribution' reports Skills+Agents axes as DRIFT (false error) and exits non-zero. Reproduced with clean HOME: status=drift, missing=plugin_enabled on Skills+Agents.
findings.suggested_fix: Drop plugin_enabled from the Skills/Agents axis contracts (or replace with a check that holds under github-source/--plugin-dir), since no install path writes the ditto-local enabledPlugins key anymore.

findings.reason: Test pins the dead model: injects enabledPlugins {'ditto@ditto-local': true} and asserts a fully-deployed env maps every check true. Passes (pure fn unchanged) but encodes a contract the installer no longer fulfills; masks the high finding above.
findings.suggested_fix: Update fixture/assertions once plugin_enabled semantics are decided.

findings.reason: Stale comments still say the binary build needs bun's --compile / is self-contained; the producer now emits a ~1MB bun bundle via --target=bun (no --compile). No active --compile producer remains (grep verified). Doc-drift only, not behavior.
findings.suggested_fix: Reword the three comments to describe the bundle, not --compile.

findings.reason: Marketplace name is still 'ditto-local' and description says 'Local marketplace' — semantically stale for a github-source model. Internally consistent (install ref ditto@ditto-local, docs match, 'claude plugin validate .' exits 0) so not a blocker.
findings.suggested_fix: Optional: rename marketplace for the github-source model and update docs/install*.md + DEVELOPMENT.md in lockstep.

findings.reason: ac-1 packaging gap: bin/ditto is now trackable (.gitignore !bin/ditto verified) but still UNTRACKED (git ls-files empty). github-source install requires bin/ditto COMMITTED; this diff makes it trackable but does not stage/commit it. Load-bearing for ac-1.
findings.suggested_fix: git add bin/ditto and commit it as part of the plugin surface.

evidence.summary: no --compile in producers; only stale comments + ADR/docs reference it
both: 'a /usr/bin/env bun script executable' (NOT Mach-O) — ac-4 met
clean, no unused imports (spawnSync removed from build-plugin), exit 0
exit 1 = NOT ignored; git add --dry-run accepts bin/ditto; bin/ditto.exe stays ignored
only a comment remains; registerPlugin/unregisterPlugin/globalSettingsPath removed — ac-3 met for installer

evidence.command: HOME=tmp bun run src/cli/index.ts doctor distribution --output json --advisory
evidence.summary: status=drift, plugin_enabled=false, Skills+Agents missing plugin_enabled — REGRESSION reproduced
Validation passed (exit 0); plugin source ./ — ac-1 marketplace shape valid
runs; no more global_settings/marketplace/plugin_enabled fields — consistent with diff
empty — confirms keeping bare 'ditto' correct; ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/ditto would be /bin/ditto
macOS system ditto exists (root) — residual shadow risk; clean env needs plugin bin ahead of /usr/bin (Claude PATH order unverifiable here)
1381 pass, 2 fail; both failures (repo-self-validation wi_v01bootstrap, e2e-browser Chromium) pre-existing, do NOT reference changed surface

unverified.item: ac-1 end-to-end 'claude plugin install ditto@<gh>' exit 0 + enabled
unverified.reason: needs a real github remote + clean machine + committed bin/ditto; cannot run github-source install in sandbox. Marketplace validates and surface is trackable, but actual install unproven.

unverified.item: ac-2 'claude --plugin-dir dist/plugin' loads ditto + rebuild reflects
unverified.reason: needs an interactive Claude session; not runnable here. dist/plugin surface assembled correctly but load unproven.

unverified.item: ac-3 '/plugins' Errors=0 after removing directory marketplace
unverified.reason: needs interactive /plugins UI. Installer no longer writes file:// (verified statically), but UI error count unverified.

unverified.item: Claude prepends plugin bin/ ahead of /usr/bin on clean envs
unverified.reason: external host behavior; /usr/bin/ditto shadow means bare 'ditto' correctness depends on PATH order not observable here.

recommended_next_action: Fix the high finding: realign src/core/distribution-doctor.ts so plugin_enabled no longer gates Skills/Agents under the new no-registration install model (and update its test), since the change made that check structurally false and turned 'ditto doctor distribution' into a false-error reporter.
